description: Phase 1 of the doctor command consolidation: author .opencode/commands/doctor.md (router, ~250-300 LOC) + .opencode/commands/doctor/mcp.md (~150 LOC) + .opencode/commands/doctor/_routes.yaml (canonical route manifest) + .opencode/commands/doctor/scripts/route-validate.sh (CI assertion). Ships ADDITIVELY alongside the existing 10 commands. Mirrors land in .claude / .gemini / .codex. No YAML modifications, no deletes, no playbook touch — those are Phase 2.
